title: 🥒 Picklesburgh: It's A Really Big Dill
text:
THE DESTINATION FOR ALL THINGS PICKLED
Picklesburgh 2026
Thursday, July 16th – Sunday, July 19th
Subscribe for updates
THURSDAY IS BACK
Relish in 4 days of flavor and fun! Returning for it’s 11th Year, the 2026 Picklesburgh Festival, will return on Thursday, July 16th through Sunday, July 19, 2026. More details about Picklesburgh 2026, including the schedule and footprint, will be announced over the coming weeks right here at Picklesburgh.com
Vendor Applications Now Open
Interested vendors can learn more and
apply now
.
Help Us Defend Our Title
🥒 Voting is officially open for
USA TODAY 10Best!
Picklesburgh is a 4x past winner of America’s Best Specialty Food Festival according to USA TODAY 10Best People’s Choice Awards and this year will be no different with YOUR help! 🗳️
Vote DAILY on EACH device you have until polls close at 12:00pm on March 2, 2026.
VOTE HERE
USA Today 10Best
has once again named
Picklesburgh
as the
2025 Readers’ Choice
Best Specialty Food Festival
!
Vote now to help us keep the title!
